notableEvents.label: David Fry pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: David Fry grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Daniel Schneemann out at 2nd. David Fry out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: David Fry GIDP
notableEvents.detail: David Fry grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Daniel Schneemann out at 2nd. David Fry out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: David Fry pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: David Fry grounds out, shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Masyn Winn reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Juan Brito.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Church out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Angel Martínez. Thomas Saggese scores.
